dir.code: stt_rec, ngay, ma_ca, ma_ca_ct, ma_cong, gio_tu
dir.order: stt_rec, ngay, ma_ca, ma_ca_ct, ma_cong, gio_tu

title.v: bổ sung công làm việc cho nhân viên

items.key: (@@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or ma_bp in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

items.key: (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

command.text: declare @ho_ten nvarchar(256), @ma_nv varchar(32) select @ma_nv = rtrim(ma_nv), @ho_ten = rtrim(ho_nv) + space(1) + ten_nv from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @ma_nv as ma_nv, @ho_ten as ho_ten return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin điều chỉnh công cho nhân viên đang cập nhật đã được khai báo, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

&CheckLockedBeforeInsert;
if exists(select * from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ngay = @ngay and ma_ca = @ma_ca and ma_ca_ct = @ma_ca_ct and ma_cong = @ma_cong and gio_tu = @gio_tu) begin select 'ngay' as field, @$exists as message return end select @tg_tu = cast(convert(varchar(8), @ngay, 112) + ' ' + @gio_tu as datetime) + case when @hs_tu = 1 then 1 else 0 end, @tg_den = cast(convert(varchar(8), @ngay, 112) + ' ' + @gio_den as datetime) + case when @hs_den = 1 then 1 else 0 end, @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

&CheckLockedBeforeUpdate;
if not exists(select * from @@table where ngay = $ngay.OldValue and ma_ca = $ma_ca.OldValue and ma_ca_ct = $ma_ca_ct.OldValue and ma_cong = $ma_cong.OldValue and gio_tu = $gio_tu.OldValue and stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue) begin select 'ngay' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if @ngay <> $ngay.OldValue or @ma_ca <> $ma_ca.OldValue or @ma_ca_ct <> $ma_ca_ct.OldValue or @ma_cong <> $ma_cong.OldValue or @gio_tu <> $gio_tu.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (ngay = $ngay.OldValue and ma_ca = $ma_ca.OldValue and ma_ca_ct = $ma_ca_ct.OldValue and ma_cong = $ma_cong.OldValue and gio_tu = $gio_tu.OldValue)) and (ngay = @ngay and ma_ca = @ma_ca and ma_ca_ct = @ma_ca_ct and ma_cong = @ma_cong and gio_tu = @gio_tu) and stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select 'ngay' as field, @$exists as message return end end

update @@table set kieu = 0, tg_tu = cast(convert(varchar(8), ngay, 112) + ' ' + gio_tu as datetime) + case when hs_tu = 1 then 1 else 0 end, tg_den = cast(convert(varchar(8), ngay, 112) + ' ' + gio_den as datetime) + case when hs_den = 1 then 1 else 0 end, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ngay = @ngay and ma_ca = @ma_ca and ma_ca_ct = @ma_ca_ct and ma_cong = @ma_cong and gio_tu = @gio_tu and stt_rec = @stt_rec

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin select stt_rec from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv return end
